job_description:
# Healthcare Data Analyst - SQL Excel
Company: Javen Technologies, Inc
Source: Dice
Employment type: Contract W2 / Contract Independent
Checked: April 30, 2026
Posted: April 29, 2026
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/e130c5c4-186c-47f7-a24e-2f7ebb8b620a

## Highlights
- Remote healthcare data analyst role posted 1 day ago and updated 13 hours ago on Dice.
- Focuses on collecting, analyzing, and interpreting healthcare data for clinical, operational, and business decisions.
- Requires SQL, Excel, pivot tables, VLOOKUP, data accuracy/integrity, HIPAA, reporting, and healthcare workflow understanding.
- Healthcare data examples include patient records, claims, billing, and operational metrics.
strengths: Strong SQL, Excel, healthcare data, reporting, data accuracy, and HIPAA alignment.
Claims, billing, and operational metrics map well to payer and healthcare analytics experience.
Remote role with a practical analyst scope rather than heavy engineering ownership.
gaps: Contract role rather than full-time permanent.
Description is broad and vendor-generated; verify client details before investing heavy tailoring.
notes: Apply if contract work is acceptable. Tailor toward SQL extraction, Excel analysis, healthcare claims/member data, reporting accuracy, and HIPAA-aware data handling.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL & Excel Reporting | Data Quality
